'''SH∑1-B''' was a basic [[MD-5 medical droid|MD5 general-practitioner]] model [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]], the taller of two [[Droid/Legends|droids]] that assisted [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] in the recuperation of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after he escaped [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|from]] [[Susejo|the]] [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|pit]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. His name was unpronounceable to most [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] creatures.<ref name="MandA" />

{{Droid-stub}}
